label: Enable torrent accordions
description: Group torrent stream providers into collapsible sections.

label: Show ratings panel
description: Show merged ratings cards from Ratings Aggregator streams.

label: Show IMDb episode ratings
description: Show IMDb episode/series rating cards when available.

label: Show WatchHub panel
description: Show provider availability panel from WatchHub/Guidebox streams.

label: Show AfterCredits panel
description: Show AfterCredits hints panel in stream details.
